requirement_topic.en: EMC and Technical Standards (SSMO / SS series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容及技术标准（SSMO / SS系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容及技術標準（SSMO / SS系列）

summary.en: Sudan's national standards body SSMO (Sudanese Standards and Metrology Organization) publishes SS series standards that largely adopt IEC and ISO international standards. Wireless and electronic devices must conform to applicable SS/IEC EMC emission and immunity standards. SSMO standards alignment with IEC means IEC-based test reports (from ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories) are generally accepted for NCRTC technical file submissions, but SSMO or NCRTC confirmation of applicable standard versions should be sought.
summary.zh: 苏丹国家标准机构SSMO（苏丹标准与计量组织）发布SS系列标准，主要采用IEC和ISO国际标准。无线及电子设备须符合适用的SS/IEC电磁兼容辐射和抗扰度标准。SSMO标准与IEC对齐，意味着基于IEC的测试报告（来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室）通常被NCRTC技术文件提交所接受，但应向SSMO或NCRTC确认适用标准版本。
summary.zht: 蘇丹國家標準機構SSMO（蘇丹標準與計量組織）發布SS系列標準，主要採用IEC和ISO國際標準。無線及電子裝置須符合適用的SS/IEC電磁相容輻射和抗擾度標準。SSMO標準與IEC對齊，意味著基於IEC的測試報告（來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室）通常被NCRTC技術文件提交所接受，但應向SSMO或NCRTC確認適用標準版本。

standards_or_laws: IEC CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment EMC emissions, adopted as applicable SS standard)
IEC 61000-4 series (immunity — adopted as applicable SS standard)
NCRTC technical file requirement for type approval dossier

summary.en: China uses GB/T 9254 (based on CISPR 22/32) for EMC emissions and GB/T 17618 (based on CISPR 24) for immunity of IT equipment. These GB/T standards broadly align with IEC/CISPR and test reports may be usable as supporting documentation, but must be from ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories and confirmed acceptable by NCRTC.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术设备电磁兼容辐射采用GB/T 9254（基于CISPR 22/32），抗扰度采用GB/T 17618（基于CISPR 24）。这些GB/T标准与IEC/CISPR基本对齐，测试报告可作为支持文件使用，但须来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室并经NCRTC确认可接受。
summary.zht: 中國對資訊技術裝置電磁相容輻射採用GB/T 9254（基於CISPR 22/32），抗擾度採用GB/T 17618（基於CISPR 24）。這些GB/T標準與IEC/CISPR基本對齊，測試報告可作為支持文件使用，但須來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室並經NCRTC確認可接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 (EMC immunity — based on CISPR 24 / IEC 61000-4 series)
CCC EMC testing requirement for applicable product categories

gap.en: SSMO SS standards largely mirror IEC/CISPR, so IEC-based test reports from ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories are generally suitable for NCRTC technical file submissions. However, specific applicable SS standard versions must be confirmed with SSMO or NCRTC, as adoption status and version currency can differ from the latest IEC editions. GB/T reports alone (from non-ILAC-recognized Chinese labs) may not be accepted.
gap.zh: SSMO SS标准与IEC/CISPR基本一致，因此来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室的IEC测试报告通常适用于NCRTC技术文件提交。但须向SSMO或NCRTC确认具体适用SS标准版本，因采用状态和版本可能与最新IEC版本不同。仅凭GB/T报告（来自非ILAC认可中国实验室）可能不被接受。
gap.zht: SSMO SS標準與IEC/CISPR基本一致，因此來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的IEC測試報告通常適用於NCRTC技術文件提交。但須向SSMO或NCRTC確認具體適用SS標準版本，因採用狀態和版本可能與最新IEC版本不同。僅憑GB/T報告（來自非ILAC認可中國實驗室）可能不被接受。

source.publisher: SSMO — Sudanese Standards and Metrology Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC/CISPR-based test reports from ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories are generally suitable for Sudan NCRTC type approval technical file submissions. Confirm applicable SS standard version numbers with SSMO or NCRTC before finalizing the test plan. GB/T test reports from non-ILAC-recognized laboratories alone are unlikely to be accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室的IEC/CISPR测试报告通常适用于苏丹NCRTC型式核准技术文件提交。在最终确定测试计划前，应向SSMO或NCRTC确认适用SS标准版本号。仅凭非ILAC认可实验室的GB/T测试报告可能不被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的IEC/CISPR測試報告通常適用於蘇丹NCRTC型式核准技術文件提交。在最終確定測試計劃前，應向SSMO或NCRTC確認適用SS標準版本號。僅憑非ILAC認可實驗室的GB/T測試報告可能不被接受。

requirement_topic.en: Arabic Labelling and SSMO Marking Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 阿拉伯语标注及SSMO标志要求
requirement_topic.zht: 阿拉伯語標注及SSMO標誌要求

summary.en: Arabic-language product labelling is commonly required in Sudan for consumer and commercial electronics. Labels must include product name, model, country of origin, importer name and address in Sudan, rated voltage and frequency, and any NCRTC approval reference. SSMO may require conformity marking for product categories under its mandatory certification scope. Confirm current SSMO mandatory product list and labelling requirements before import.
summary.zh: 苏丹通常要求消费及商用电子产品提供阿拉伯语产品标注。标签须包括产品名称、型号、原产国、苏丹进口商名称及地址、额定电压及频率，以及任何NCRTC批准参考号。对于其强制认证范围内的产品类别，SSMO可能要求符合性标志。进口前须确认SSMO当前强制产品目录及标注要求。
summary.zht: 蘇丹通常要求消費及商用電子產品提供阿拉伯語產品標注。標籤須包括產品名稱、型號、原產國、蘇丹進口商名稱及地址、額定電壓及頻率，以及任何NCRTC批准參考號。對於其強制認證範圍內的產品類別，SSMO可能要求符合性標誌。進口前須確認SSMO當前強制產品目錄及標注要求。

standards_or_laws: SSMO mandatory product certification requirements (SS series)
Sudan import labelling regulations (Arabic language requirement)

summary.en: China requires Chinese-language labelling on products sold domestically. CCC marking must appear on applicable certified products. Export products may carry English or other language labels per destination market requirements; Chinese domestic labelling requirements do not satisfy Sudan Arabic labelling obligations.
summary.zh: 中国要求在国内销售的产品提供中文标注。适用认证产品须标注CCC标志。出口产品可按目标市场要求使用英语或其他语言标签；中国国内标注要求不满足苏丹阿拉伯语标注义务。
summary.zht: 中國要求在國內銷售的產品提供中文標注。適用認證產品須標注CCC標誌。出口產品可按目標市場要求使用英語或其他語言標籤；中國國內標注要求不滿足蘇丹阿拉伯語標注義務。

standards_or_laws: China GB labelling standards for electronic products
CCC marking requirement for applicable product categories
China export product labelling per destination market

gap.en: Chinese-language labels and CCC markings do not satisfy Sudan Arabic labelling requirements. A separate Arabic-language label must be affixed or printed on product packaging and the unit itself, including Sudan importer details and NCRTC approval reference. SSMO conformity marking requirements for specific product categories must be separately verified.
gap.zh: 中文标签和CCC标志不满足苏丹阿拉伯语标注要求。须在产品包装和产品本体贴附或印刷阿拉伯语标签，包括苏丹进口商详情及NCRTC批准参考号。须单独核实特定产品类别的SSMO符合性标志要求。
gap.zht: 中文標籤和CCC標誌不滿足蘇丹阿拉伯語標注要求。須在產品包裝和產品本體貼附或印刷阿拉伯語標籤，包括蘇丹進口商詳情及NCRTC批准參考號。須單獨核實特定產品類別的SSMO符合性標誌要求。

source.publisher: SSMO — Sudanese Standards and Metrology Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Arabic-language labelling including Sudan importer details and NCRTC approval reference is required. Chinese domestic labelling and CCC markings do not satisfy this requirement. Confirm SSMO mandatory product list and any SSMO conformity marking requirements applicable to the specific device category before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须提供阿拉伯语标注，包括苏丹进口商详情及NCRTC批准参考号。中国国内标注和CCC标志不满足此要求。进口前须确认SSMO强制产品目录及适用于特定设备类别的SSMO符合性标志要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須提供阿拉伯語標注，包括蘇丹進口商詳情及NCRTC批准參考號。中國國內標注和CCC標誌不滿足此要求。進口前須確認SSMO強制產品目錄及適用於特定裝置類別的SSMO符合性標誌要求。
